section_name: Applicability of Chapter to Government Vehicles
text:
(a) This chapter does not apply to a government vehicle.

(b) The provisions of this chapter do not apply to an officer, agent, or employee of the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state while operating a government vehicle in the course of that person’s employment.

(c) The provisions of this chapter, other than Section 601.054 (Owner May Provide Evidence of Financial Responsibility for Others) , do not apply to a motor vehicle that is subject to Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) .

(d) In this section, “government vehicle” means a motor vehicle owned by the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.007 — Applicability of Chapter to Government Vehicles

(a) This chapter does not apply to a government vehicle.

(b) The provisions of this chapter do not apply to an officer, agent, or employee of the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state while operating a government vehicle in the course of that person’s employment.

(c) The provisions of this chapter, other than Section 601.054 (Owner May Provide Evidence of Financial Responsibility for Others) , do not apply to a motor vehicle that is subject to Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) .

(d) In this section, “government vehicle” means a motor vehicle owned by the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 533 (S.B.312), Sec. 51, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The provisions of this chapter do not apply to an officer, agent, or employee of the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state while operating a government vehicle in the course of that person’s employment.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The provisions of this chapter, other than Section 601.054 (Owner May Provide Evidence of Financial Responsibility for Others) , do not apply to a motor vehicle that is subject to Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) .

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: In this section, “government vehicle” means a motor vehicle owned by the United States, this state, or a political subdivision of this state.
